description: Learn how to set up a local development environment for Solana, including using the Solana Test Validator and connecting to localhost.
topic_summary: Setting up a local Solana development environment [t=0:16] involves starting the Solana Test Validator [t=0:52], configuring the anchor TOML [t=0:11], and deploying programs [t=0:16]. You can also clone programs from mainnet [t=0:18], use the Solana Explorer [t=0:28], and connect Phantom Wallet [t=0:34]. Additionally, you can generate SOL for testing [t=0:41].
